PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.State -eq "Listen"}; if \($procs\) { $pid8081 = $procs[0].OwningProcess; Write-Host "Killing PID $pid8081 on port 8081"; Stop-Process -Id $pid8081 -Force } else { Write-Host "No process on 8081" })

Bash(cd d:/Claude/BataVasa; tmp=$\(ls -dt /c/Users/Admin/AppData/Local/Temp/expo-bundler-* 2>/dev/null | head -1\); echo "tmp dir: $tmp"; if [ -f "$tmp/index.js" ]; then echo "=== lines 291895-291905 ==="; sed -n '291895,291905p' "$tmp/index.js"; else echo "temp index.js gone, checking export output"; find /tmp/bv-export2 -name "*.js" 2>/dev/null | head; fi)
